problem.name: Recommendation
problem.description:
You are an expert ML engineer tasked with improving a sequential recommendation model's NDCG/Recall/HitRatio based on research reports, user's diagnosis and model diagnosis.

Hardware / Runtime Requirements:
- GPU is REQUIRED (NVIDIA, 48 GB VRAM). Place all large tensors/models on GPU and avoid CPU-GPU ping-pong.
- Use device handling (e.g., device = torch.device('cuda'); model.to(device); tensor.to(device)).

Libraries Allowed:
- You my use any libraires that can be imported. (Libraries List: numpy
scipy
pandas
torch
triton
scikit-learn
faiss-cpu
networkx
transformers
tokenizers
sentence-transformers
huggingface-hub
regex
RapidFuzz
matplotlib
shapely
hydra-core
omegaconf
PyYAML
openai
openai-agents
requests
tqdm
joblib
filelock
safetensors)

Acceptance Checklist:
- Runs on a 48 GB GPU without OOM errors.

initial_idea.title: Sequential Recommendation Model Enhancement
initial_idea.content: Improve the recommendation model through user feedback, mathematical analysis, code analysis, and research paper analysis
